scripts.check: npm run check:html && npm run check:js && npm run check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build --workspace @challanse/contracts --if-present && npm run build --workspace @challanse/edge && npm run build --workspace @challanse/reviewer
scripts.audit: for run in 1 2 3; do lighthouse http://127.0.0.1:4173/ --only-categories=performance,accessibility,best-practices,seo --output=json --output-path=.lighthouse-$run.json --quiet --chrome-flags="--headless=new --no-sandbox --disable-gpu" || exit 1; done && node scripts/check-lighthouse.mjs .lighthouse-1.json .lighthouse-2.json .lighthouse-3.json
